q: What is my policy number?
What is the sum insured on my policy?
When does my policy expire?
Who is the nominee on my policy?
How much was the total premium I paid?
Which optional add-on covers did I opt for?
expected_answer: Power Booster, Claim Protector, Inflation Protector, Nursing at Home, Dependent Accommodation Benefit, Durable Medical Equipment, 2-Hour Hospitalization.

q: What is the waiting period for pre-existing diseases?
What is the initial waiting period under the policy?
What is the waiting period for maternity benefits?
Explain the Reset Benefit on the Elevate policy.
expected_answer: Reset of up to 100% of sum insured, unlimited times in a policy year.

q: How does the Power Booster benefit work?
expected_answer: Accumulates a 100% Super Loyalty Bonus per year, no reduction even on claims.

q: What does Inflation Protector do?
expected_answer: Increases the sum insured at renewal in line with CPI inflation.

q: How many days of pre-hospitalization and post-hospitalization expenses are covered?
What is the definition of Domiciliary Hospitalization in the Elevate policy?
expected_answer: Treatment taken at home when the patient cannot be moved or no hospital room is available.

q: Define Loyalty Bonus as used in the policy.
expected_answer: Addition to the Sum Insured granted by the insurer without any premium increase.

q: What is meant by Day Care Treatment?
expected_answer: Treatment that historically required hospitalization over 24 hours but is completed in under 24 hours.

q: Does the policy cover AYUSH treatment?
expected_answer: Yes, AYUSH inpatient treatment is covered up to the Sum Insured.

q: What is the Claim Protector add-on?
expected_answer: Covers consumables and non-payable items like gloves and masks up to the sum insured.

q: What benefits does the 2-Hour Hospitalization cover provide?
expected_answer: Covers hospitalization of at least 2 hours (24 hours for AYUSH) up to the annual sum insured.

q: What is the room category I am entitled to?
